section.div: macOS development environment setup: Easy-to-understand instructions with automated setup scripts for developer tools like Vim, Sublime Text, Bash, iTerm, Python data analysis, Spark, Hadoop MapReduce, AWS, Heroku, JavaScript web development, Android development, common data stores, and dev-based OS X defaults.
Minimal CLI coding agent by Mistral
Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.
Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
